subject: feat: add recent searches history and share station button
body:
- Recent searches hook (useRecentSearches): AsyncStorage-backed, max 10
  entries, deduplicated by coordinate proximity (~1km threshold)
- LocationSearch: shows recent searches when input focused and empty,
  with "Clear" option
- Share station: platform share sheet (native) / navigator.share (web)
  / clipboard fallback, includes cheapest price and Google Maps link
- Station detail: share button alongside Get Directions

Tags: features, ux, search, share
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: features
Semver: minor
